mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_table( first_name, last_name, user_name, role, current_state, is_active, last_login ) VALUES( #{firstName}, #{lastName}, #{userName}, #{role}, #{currentState}, #{isActive}, #{lastLogin} )
mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, first_name AS firstName, last_name AS lastName, user_name AS userName, role, current_state AS currentState, is_active AS isActive, last_login AS lastLogin FROM user_table WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
